Settings.label: Overhang speed
Settings.tooltip: This is the speed for various overhang degrees. Overhang degrees are expressed as a percentage of line width. 0 speed means no slowing down for the overhang degree range and wall speed is used

Settings.label: Bridge
Settings.tooltip: Set speed for external and internal bridges
